leagueDesc.title: About this league
leagueDesc.hint: Markdown supported: headings, bold, lists, links, images.
leagueDesc.placeholder: Introduce your league, its rules, prizes…

verify.title: Verify scores
verify.sub: Proof that predictions are not edited after kickoff.
verify.how:
Every time a pick changes, the app appends a sealed commitment to an append-only ledger, hash-chained to the one before it. Editing any past pick would break every later link in the chain. Your browser pulls the whole ledger and recomputes it here - nothing trusts the server's word.
A pick stays sealed until its match kicks off; after that, the score and its secret salt are revealed so anyone can re-open the commitment and check it.
verify.running: Verifying the chain in your browser…

reason.commitment: a pick that no longer matches its seal

verify.head: Chain head (seq {seq})
verify.snapshotHint: Save this hash. If the history is ever rewritten, it will stop matching.

witness.title: Your device's witness
witness.explain: Your browser remembers the last chain head it verified (in local storage, never sent to us). Each visit it checks the chain still extends that head - so a pick edited after you last saw it shows up here, even if you never kept the hash yourself. A fresh device or cleared storage starts over.
witness.since: Consistent with this device's view since {date} (#{from} to #{to}).
witness.first-seen: First visit on this device - baseline pinned
witness.tampered: History changed since your last visit
witness.rolled-back: Entries are missing since your last visit

dm.title: Messages
dm.cantMessage: This user hasn't set up messaging.
dm.needsRestore: Restore your chat key on this device to read your messages.

chat.e2eeHint: End-to-end encrypted: only league members can read this, not even the site owner.
chat.off: Chat is off for this league.
chat.awaitingKeyHint: Chat is end-to-end encrypted. A member who is already in the chat has to come online to hand you the key. This happens automatically - leave this open and it will unlock.

muted.intro: You won't see messages from these members. They can still see yours.

warning.title: Turn on end-to-end encrypted chat?
warning.body1: Messages are encrypted on members' devices. The site owner stores only scrambled text and cannot read this chat, moderate it, or recover it.
warning.body2: Only the league's owner and moderators can turn this on. What members say here is their own responsibility, not the site owner's.
warning.body3: If everyone loses their key and recovery code, the history is gone for good: there is no reset.

recovery.title: Save your recovery code
recovery.body: This restores your chat on another device or after clearing your browser. It is shown once and cannot be retrieved. Keep it safe: anyone with it can read your chat.

restore.body: Enter your recovery code to read this league's chat on this device.

rotate.title: Rotate the chat key?
rotate.body: Everyone in the league gets a fresh key from now on. Anyone you have removed loses access to new messages; past messages stay readable for members who already had them. Use this after removing someone, or if a member cannot read the chat.

verify.intro: Compare these numbers with each member in person or over a channel you trust. If a member's number does not match, their key may have been tampered with.
verify.changedWarn: A member's key changed since you last saw it - verify it before you trust the chat.
verify.empty: No other members have a key on this device yet.
verify.title: Verify keys

skins.title: My Little Prono
skins.hint: You found it. Pick your pony - it restyles the whole app.

odds.title: Bookmaker odds - 1: home win, X: draw, 2: away win. Decimal odds; the lower the number, the more likely the outcome.

home.tagline: Predict football scores, earn points for how close you get, and out-foresee your friends on the global ranking.

landing.sub: Nostragoalus turns football tournaments into a prediction game - call the scores, earn points for how close you get, and climb the leaderboard.
landing.featuresSub: From closeness scoring to live brackets and an interactive world map.

scoring.d: Points scale with accuracy - nail the exact score, the goal difference, or just the right outcome.

joker.d: Double the points on one match per round when you're feeling confident.

champion.d: Call the tournament winner for a season-long bonus - the longer the odds at pick time, the bigger the reward.

live.d: Scores, stats and the standings update in real time over WebSockets - watch the table move as the goals go in.

bracket.d: Follow the road to the final on a clean, two-sided bracket.

map.d: Pick a country on a world map for its squad, form, standings and next match.

stats.d: Possession, cards, attendance, goal timeline and each team's top scorer & passer.

ranking.d: Compete per competition or on the all-time global leaderboard.

competitions.d: World Cup 2026, World Cup 2022 and UEFA Euro 2024 - switch in a click.

bestScorer.d: Pick who you think finishes the tournament's top scorer for an extra bonus at the final.

leagues.d: Spin up a league for friends, family or the office - share a code and race for top spot; your predictions stay yours.

bot.d: A virtual player that always picks the crowd's most-common scoreline - beat the wisdom of the crowd to prove your edge.

landing.scoringSub: Scored on the 90-minute result. The closer you are, the more you earn.
landing.ctaSub: Create an account, invite your friends, and see who really knows their football.
landing.showcaseSub: A tournament with two dozen oracles already arguing.

fixtures.d: Inline score inputs, kickoff countdowns, the crowd's combined call under every match, and your crowned champion watching over it all.

match.d: Goals, cards and substitutions laced on one timeline, official stats, head-to-head back to the archives.

bracket.d: A real two-sided bracket with penalty shootouts where they happened.

map.t: A world cup on a world map
map.d: Every team where it lives - squads, form and standings one click away.

ranking.d: Per-competition and global leaderboards, with movement arrows and medals.

team.d: Official squads with positions, the manager, and tournament stats that match the federations' own numbers.

bot.d: A virtual player that picks the crowd's most-common scoreline every match - scored by the real engine, with rarity bonuses, so you can measure yourself against the wisdom of the crowd.

leagues.d: Group up with friends, family or the office - create a league, share its code, and race for the top spot in your own table.

about.title: About
about.intro: Nostragoalus is an open-source football prediction game: call the scores, earn points for how close you get, and out-foresee your friends.
about.aiText: This entire application - code, design, translations and even the artwork pipeline - was built in collaboration with Claude (Anthropic), with a human football fan directing every decision. The AI wrote the code; the humans own the opinions.
about.stackSub: The open-source software this app stands on. Every card links to the project; the badge links to its license.
about.dataText: Match data comes from publicly accessible FIFA and UEFA endpoints (unofficial, read-only, politely rate-limited). Map tiles by OpenStreetMap contributors. This project is not affiliated with or endorsed by FIFA or UEFA.

roadmap.title: Roadmap
roadmap.sub: What's planned, what's being built, and what already shipped.
roadmap.empty: Nothing here yet - watch this space.
roadmap.error: Couldn't load the roadmap right now.

suggest.titleLabel: Your idea in a few words
suggest.empty: No suggestions yet - be the first.

update.installPrompt: Install the app for quick, full-screen access

cron.title: Background tasks
cron.hint: The background jobs - scheduled and on-demand: their schedule, next and last run, run count and last result. Run one now, or tap a result for its output.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.sub: Everything you need before your first pick.

q1.a: Each match is scored on closeness: the exact score earns 3 points, the right goal difference 2, just the right outcome 1, and a miss 0. Nailing an exact score few others dared brings a rarity bonus on top.

q2.a: At kickoff, per match, enforced by the server - not your clock. Until then you can change your pick as often as you like, from the fixtures page, your picks, or the match view.

q3.a: Once per round you can mark one match as your joker: it doubles every point you earn on it. You can move it to another match in the same round as long as neither match has kicked off.

q4.a: Before the first kickoff, call the team that lifts the trophy. If you are right you collect a bonus at the final - bigger the bolder the call (the lower your pick's FIFA ranking at pick time, the more it pays) - and your crowned flag watches over your fixtures all tournament long.

q5.a: Only after a match kicks off. Your pending predictions are private, so nobody can copy your genius before lock.

q6.q: What about extra time and penalties?
q6.a: Predictions are scored on the final score of play; penalty shootouts decide who advances but never your points. A knockout draw that goes to penalties scores as a draw.

q7.q: Where does the data come from?
q7.a: From publicly accessible FIFA and UEFA endpoints: fixtures, live scores (about every two minutes during matches), squads, and stats. Bookmaker odds come from Sofascore, and the world map is OpenStreetMap.

q8.a: Completely. The whole project is open source under the WTFPL - you can read every line, run your own instance for your friends, and do what you want with it.

formula.a: Every prediction is scored on the regulation (90-minute) result. The full formula:
formula.example: Example: you call Brazil 2-1 and it finishes 2-1 - an exact score (3). Among everyone who also saw the Brazil win, only ~4% nailed 2-1, so the rarity tier adds +4, for 7 points. On the final, or with your joker, it doubles.
formula.code:
points = (base + rarity) × multiplier     (+ champion & Golden Boot at the final)

base    = 3  exact score            (home & away both right)
          2  right goal difference  (and right outcome)
          1  right outcome only     (win / draw / loss)
          0  otherwise

rarity  = a bonus on an exact score, by how rare your scoreline was
          among the players who also got the result right:
          +5  < 1%      +4  < 5%       +3  < 12%
          +2  < 22%     +1  < 35%      +0  otherwise   (needs ≥ 5 such players)
          plus a smaller add-on for a rare but correct result, by how
          few of all players called that outcome:  +2  < 10%   +1  < 25%

multiplier  = 2  on your round joker, and on every final
              1  otherwise

champion    = season-long bonus if your winner pick lifts the trophy,
              bigger the longer the odds (FIFA-rank tiers, up to 4×)
Golden Boot = bonus if your top-scorer pick finishes the tournament's top scorer

q9.q: What is the Golden Boot pick?
q9.a: Alongside your champion, pick the player you think finishes the tournament's top scorer. Everyone who picked a player tied for the most goals (own goals excluded) collects a bonus at the final.

q10.a: Leagues are groups scoped to a competition, private (shareable code) or public. Create one or join your friends' - your predictions are always yours; leagues just filter the rankings and crowd stats to that group.

q11.a: Yes. While matches are in play the leaderboard shows provisional standings - your in-progress picks scored at the current scoreline, updating live as the goals go in. The group tables on a match move live too.

err.notFound: This one sailed over the bar - the page you're looking for is lost among the stars.
err.generic: Something went wrong on our side.
err.teapot: I'm a teapot. You asked it to brew something it just can't - so it is, politely, refusing.
err.serverError: Something broke on our side - the server got sent off. Give it a moment and try again.

leagues.title: Leagues
leagues.empty: You're not in any league yet.
leagues.visibilityPublic: Public — anyone can join and view rankings
leagues.regenerateConfirm: Generate a new code? The current one stops working.
leagues.transferConfirm: Make {name} the owner? You become a moderator.
leagues.kickConfirm: Remove {name} from the league? They won't be re-added automatically.
leagues.leaveConfirm: Leave this league? You won't be re-added automatically.
leagues.leaveOwnerBlocked: Transfer ownership or delete the league first.
leagues.deleteConfirm: Delete this league for every member? This cannot be undone.
leagues.publicEmpty: No public league yet for this competition.
leagues.onboardBody: Join a private league to compete with friends or colleagues. You can also create one, or skip and play in the global ranking.
leagues.crowdBonusHint: Crowd bonus points are always based on everyone's predictions, not only your league.
leagues.modeNormalDesc: Predict exact scores; the classic game.
leagues.modeEasyDesc: Just call the winner (or a draw). Points scale with the odds - longshots pay more.
leagues.modeHardDesc: Predict scores and stake a confidence budget across each round. A correct call pays your stake; the exact score pays double.
leagues.modeHardcoreDesc: Last player standing. A wrong call costs a life; run out and you're eliminated. Survivors win together.
leagues.modeLocked: The competition has started; the mode is locked.

invites.title: Invite links
invites.hint: Share a link to let people join. Add an expiry or a use limit for tighter control.
invites.alreadyMember: You're already a member of this league.
invites.exhausted: This invite link has reached its use limit.
invites.notFound: This invite link is invalid or no longer exists.
invites.joinFailed: Couldn't join the league. The link may have just expired.

welcome.title: Welcome to Nostragoalus!
welcome.body: A quick tour of how to play: predict match scores, climb the rankings, and beat your friends. Ready?

competition.title: Pick your tournament
competition.body: Switch between tournaments here. Your picks and rankings are kept per tournament.

predict.title: Predict the scores
predict.body: This is the game: open a match and enter the score you think it will end. Closer guesses score more points.

champion.title: Bonus picks
champion.body: Call the overall champion and the top scorer for extra points. Lock them in before kickoff.

leaderboard.title: Climb the rankings
leaderboard.body: See where you stand against everyone - and against your leagues.

notifications.title: Stay in the loop
notifications.body: Goals, kickoffs and results land here in real time. Never miss a match.

chat.title: Talk some trash
chat.body: Chat with your league mates right here while the matches play out.

done.title: You're all set!
done.body: Make your first prediction and let the games begin. You can replay this tour anytime from your account menu.

item.pickReminder: {home} v {away} kicks off soon - you haven't predicted yet.
item.championLost: Your champion pick {team} didn't win the {competition}.
item.bestScorerWon: Your Golden Boot pick {player} finished top scorer! +{points} pts
item.bestScorerLost: Your Golden Boot pick {player} didn't finish top scorer.

bestScorer.title: Golden Boot!
bestScorer.body: Your pick {player} finished top scorer - +{points} pts

feed.title: Calendar feed
feed.hint: Subscribe in your calendar app to see every fixture and pick deadline, kept up to date automatically.
feed.instructions: Paste this link into your calendar app's "subscribe by URL" option (Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, Outlook, Thunderbird). Keep it private - anyone with the link can see your feed.
feed.notPredicted: ⚠ No prediction yet - locks at kickoff

card.rarity: Only {pct}% of players called this scoreline
card.tagline: Predict the scores. Out-foresee your friends.

landing.subtitle: Nostragoalus is a football prediction game: call the scores, earn points, out-foresee your friends.

wrapped.title: Tournament Wrapped
wrapped.loadError: Could not load your Wrapped. Try again later.
wrapped.teaserBody: Once the {competition} final is decided, your personal tournament recap unlocks right here.
wrapped.bannerBody: Relive your tournament: best calls, worst misses and everything in between.
wrapped.tiersStreak: Best scoring streak: {n} in a row
wrapped.bestPickCrowd: Only {pct}% of the field saw it coming
wrapped.missField: of the field nailed the exact score
wrapped.journeyBest: Your best rank along the way: {rank}
wrapped.loneWolf: Lone wolf: the only exact call, {n} time(s)
